title: Rail Vikas Nigam is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Rail Vikas Nigam is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Join the Rail Vikas Nigam family as a Warehouse Manager in Gurgaon. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Rail Vikas Nigam:
Rail Vikas Nigam is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in TMS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Rail Vikas Nigam!
